title: ComfyUI Tutorial Series Ep 24: Unlock Flux Redux & Inpainting with LoRA
description:
In this episode of the ComfyUI tutorial series, learn how to enhance your creative workflows with Flux Redux and inpainting using LoRAs. This step-by-step guide covers advanced techniques for refining image generation, using custom nodes, masking tools, and integrating LoRA models for unique results.

What You’ll Learn:

- How to install and configure the "Advanced Reflux Control" node.
- Adjusting image strength to control the influence of prompts on output.
- Using the new Mask Editor for targeted inpainting.
- Blending prompts from multiple images for more dynamic compositions.
- Integrating LoRAs into workflows for customized styling and inpainting.

Get the workflows and instructions from discord for free
https://discord.gg/gggpkVgBf3

Check Other Episodes
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL-pohOSaL8P9kLZP8tQ1K1QWdZEgwiBM0

Unlock exclusive perks by joining our channel:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCmMbwA-s3GZDKVzGZ-kPwaQ/join

⚠️ Make sure you update ComfyUI from Manager
